description: When the AI takes a reactive action during the human's turn (e.g. Fire Overwatch), a prominent top-centre banner announces it. Configures P2 as an AI (non-spectator), then drives the real AIPlayer.ai_action_taken signal — the same signal the reactive handlers emit. Asserts: (a) the banner starts hidden, (b) a NON-reactive action (a normal move) does NOT raise it, and (c) a USE_FIRE_OVERWATCH reactive action DOES raise it with the AI's own description text. Screenshot shows the banner over the board.

steps.script: AIPlayer.emit_signal("ai_action_taken", 2, {"type": "USE_FIRE_OVERWATCH"}, "AI fires Overwatch with Allarus Custodians at your Deffkoptas (4.6 expected hits)")
